raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed the charges on my card since the vendor did not install the parts as promised in the work order. 

Credit card company : Citi Dispute case number : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Performance for vehicle inspection and service. Paid {$2700.00} for parts and service. 

XX/XX/XXXX Dropped the vehicle for replacement of parts. 

XX/XX/XXXX Picked the vehicle after replacement of parts. 

After taking the vehicle for alignment, learned that new parts were not installed. 

XX/XX/XXXX Contacted the vendor asking the details of the work done. 

XX/XX/XXXX Registered dispute with Citi. Case number XXXX. 

XX/XX/XXXX Dispute opened. 

XX/XX/XXXX Acknowledgement received from Citi. 

XX/XX/XXXX Dispute resolved without asking for any information. 

XX/XX/XXXX Contacted Citi and requested to open the case. 

XX/XX/XXXX Response received asking for more information. 

XX/XX/XXXX Replied with all the information including photographic evidence proving the parts were not replaced. The evidence has been provided after thorough inspection by a certified mechanic from a reputed repair shop. 

XX/XX/XXXX Contacted Citi and learnt that the emails go to a general mailbox and I need to mention the case number in the subject line. I forwarded all the information again with the suggested subject line. 

XX/XX/XXXX Received a response that the case was closed without providing a justification. 


I believe Citi is not supporting me as a customer. They are not doing thorough investigation on time and in a proper manner. They are not delivering the services to the customer for which they are responsible.
